See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 3210 => 'Waver', 3219 => 'Borgworm', 322 => 'Brussel', 323 => 'Antwerpen', 3242 => 'Luik', 3243 => 'Luik', 3250 => 'Brugge', 3257 => 'Ieper', 3259 => 'Oostende', 3263 => 'Aarlen', 3265 => 'Bergen', 3267 => 'Nijvel', 3268 => 'Aat', 3269 => 'Doornik', 3281 => 'Namen', 3285 => 'Hoei', 329 => 'Gent', ];
